application_id_or_name_for_get_configura: Application ID (or name for Get Configuration)
configuration_profile_id_or_name_for_get: Configuration profile ID (or name for Get Configuration)
create_a_new_hosted_aws_appconfig_config: Create a new hosted AWS AppConfig configuration version from a document and deploy it to an environment with a chosen deployment strategy.
environment_id_or_name_for_get_configura: Environment ID (or name for Get Configuration)
iam_role_arn_to_retrieve_configuration: IAM role ARN to retrieve configuration
id_of_the_created_or_affected_resource: ID of the created or affected resource
integrate_aws_appconfig_into_workflows_m: Integrate AWS AppConfig into workflows. Manage applications, environments, and configuration profiles, create and read hosted configuration versions, run and inspect deployments, and retrieve the latest deployed configuration at runtime. Requires AWS access key and secret access key.
list_aws_appconfig_applications_environm: List AWS AppConfig applications, environments, and configuration profiles to build a single inventory of what configuration exists across the account.
manage_and_retrieve_configuration_with_a: Manage and retrieve configuration with AWS AppConfig
maximum_number_of_results_to_return: Maximum number of results to return
name: Name
pagination_token_for_the_next_page: Pagination token for the next page
retrieve_the_latest_deployed_aws_appconf: Retrieve the latest deployed AWS AppConfig configuration for an application, environment, and profile and use the values to drive feature flags or dynamic settings.
state_of_the_resource_or_deployment: State of the resource or deployment
validators_configured_on_a_configuration: Validators configured on a configuration profile
watch_in_progress_aws_appconfig_deployme: Watch in-progress AWS AppConfig deployments for an environment and surface rollbacks or stalled rollouts so they can be acted on.
